scope: formal WeChat release Bot mapping, read-only local evidence
sensitive_data_policy: no credential, token, account identity, app identity, cache content, or conversation content recorded

actions.result: preview, auto-preview and upload are available; no read-only command for formal release version detail
no miniprogram-ci configuration, upload script, release manifest, wxapkg, online build hash, or attributable release pipeline artifact found

actions.action: classify keyword hits in local DevTools cache without returning content
actions.result: neither compared Bot ID matched upload/version records; release-related terms only matched DevTools feature code

not_confirmed.reason: no attributable formal-version metadata or build hash is locally available; this does not block the formal agent experience conclusion after the user-confirmed environment mapping

optional_technical_release_record_eviden: formal release version plus upload time and build hash mapped to the inspected build
or one de-identified request from the formally released mini program showing bot_id
